expectations.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
expectations.evidence: No SKILL.md generated. Output is a process document (output.md) with a 4-day workflow rhythm. Not an installable Claude skill.

expectations.text: SKILL.md name field contains domain-specific terms (client, report, consulting) not just generic 'pdca'
SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'client', 'report', 'weekly', or 'status'
working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
expectations.evidence: No working-agreements.md generated. Output is a general process document without formal intervention triggers.

expectations.text: A gate specifically around the account lead review or risks section exists in phase-prompts.md or working-agreements.md
expectations.evidence: No phase-prompts.md generated. The process document does describe an early risk-only review with account lead mid-week — the intent is there but it is not formalized as an enforceable gate.

expectations.text: Transcript shows questions were asked in sequential layers, not all at once
expectations.evidence: No discovery questions asked. The output goes straight to a process recommendation without gathering requirements.

expectations.text: A summary was presented for human confirmation before generating skill files
expectations.evidence: No confirmation gate. Output is a direct response with no HITL checkpoint.

expectations.text: After-generation instructions include /skill-creator as a validation step before production use
expectations.evidence: No skill generated. No After Generation instructions delivered.
